name: GABA Oral
description: Oral GABA is tracked for stress-related outcomes, with biological plausibility tied to CNS inhibitory signaling; human evidence remains limited and mixed.
safetyNotes: Generally well tolerated for most users.

claimMap.claim: v9.5: Recent sleep data applies to L. plantarum Lp815 increasing urinary GABA, not generic GABA capsules; keep generic GABA blocked.
claimMap.notes: v9.5: Recent sleep data applies to L. plantarum Lp815 increasing urinary GABA, not generic GABA capsules; keep generic GABA blocked.

qualifiers.dose_or_duration: Product-specific GABA dosing varies; stronger evidence may exist for specific probiotic strains that affect GABA rather than generic GABA supplements

sources.title: PubMed PMID 41554764. Minimal citation row added from existing workbook PMID; title/year/journal still require PubMed metadata extraction.
